obtainMethods.sellback: 180 Dragon Coins before 24 hours, 50 Dragon Coins after 24 hours

attacks.name: Chi Bomb
attacks.description: Up to 25% enemy HP dmg, high MP cost.
attacks.effect:
1 hit of Y damage, with -800 Crit. (Pop-up: You charged your Chi Bomb to <4X>% of it's power, consuming <10X> MP.)
  • Y is equal to X% of target's current HP before damage modifiers (Boost, Resists, etc.) are applied.
  • X is equal to quarter of the percentage Chi Bomb is charged to (bounded below 6, capped at 25).
• Adheres to the global damage cap of SQRT(Level)*100, before damage modifiers (Boost, Resists, etc.) are applied.
• Previously had the description: Reduces Enemy Health upto 50%
• Previously was able to charge to 180%; this was fixed on  July 3rd, 2020.
• Previously consumed twice as much MP as intended; this was fixed on September 28th, 2020.

familySources.title: DF Encyclopedia: Relic of When - Draconic Growth
DF Encyclopedia: Relic of When - Draconic Growth (EX)

shared.description: This strange translucent sphere contains a whirling array of gears and magic inside. Uses time magic to temporarily transform your dragon into a young dragon form for an attack!

attacks.name: Summon Young Dragon
attacks.description:
3 hits x 75% damage (225%) 
 Self: 1% max HP HoT for 5 turns. Target: (On hit) 25% DoT for 5 turns. 
 This attack has +50 Bonus and +200 Crit. Damage and DoT element based on dragon's element.
attacks.requirements: Relic of When - Draconic Growth (EX) equipped
attacks.effect:
Applies '<Dragon>'s Boon', a HoT equal to 1% of the player's max HP, to player for 5 turns; 3 hits of 75% damage, amounting to 225% damage, with +50 Bonus and +200 Crit; applies '<Dragon>'s Bane', a 25% Melee DoT effect, to target for 5 turns.
• Draco is the default name for all status names from this trinket skill; they are linked to the player's dragon's name from  Dragon Customization.
• <Dragon>'s appearance is linked to the player's dragon's Head, Wing, and Tail Styles from  Dragon Customization, as well as their current color palette from  Dragon Customization /  Armor Paint Room.
• <Dragon>'s attacks (including breath animation and '<Dragon>'s Bane' DoT) and Body (including Primal Tattoos via Dragon Primalization) are color-synchronized to player's dragon's element via  Dragon Elementization; this skill can only have 1 out of 10 available elements (Bacon, Darkness, Energy, Fire, Ice, Light, Nature, Stone, Water, and Wind).
  • Array of breath attacks:  Bacon,  Darkness,  Energy,  Fire,  Ice,  Light,  Nature,  Stone,  Water,  Wind
• If <Dragon> was equipped, either as a  pet or a  guest, <Dragon> will temporarily disappear upon using the trinket skill.

attacks.name: Vaal's Ego
attacks.description:
1 hit x 100% damage 
 Target: (On hit) 33.3% DoT for 99 turns.

1 hit of 100% damage; applies 'Ego Burn', a 33.3% damage Magic weapon element DoT effect, to target for 99 turns.
• Previously had the tooltip: Call upon the power of Vaal.
• As of the changes to the DEX stat on  April 2nd, 2021, ability's DoT effect is increased by (DEX/4)%.

• The following changes were implemented on  June 20th, 2025:
  • Tooltip was updated.
  • Cooldown was lowered from 99 to 19.

name: Voyager's Charm
description: Crafted by the Wind Elves of the Dreamwood, this enchanted charm is said to bring its bearer favorable winds toward home. This trinket has a skill that enhances the power of your base class!

attacks.name: Winds of Fate
attacks.description:
4 hits x 30% damage (120%) 
 Self: (Warrior) +30 Boost/Bonus for 3 turns. | Self: (Mage) +200 Crit for 3 turns. | Target: (Rogue) (On hit) 75% base damage DoT for 3 turns. | Self: +5% all Damage Reduction for 3 turns.
attacks.effect:
Applies 'Winds of Fate' (Gain effects depending on the player's class, see below) for 3 turns; 4 hits of 30% damage, amounting to 120% damage.
  • If the player equipped  Ancient Shadow Warrior,  DragonWarrior,  Shadow Warrior, or  Warrior, 'Winds of Fate' gains +30% Boost, +30 Bonus to player inclusive.
  • If the player equipped  Ancient Shadow Mage,  DragonMage,  Shadow Mage, or  Mage, 'Winds of Fate' gains +200 Crit to player inclusive.
  • If the player equipped  Ancient Shadow Rogue,  DragonRogue,  Shadow Rogue, or  Rogue, 'Winds of Fate' inflicts a 75% Magic weapon element DoT effect to target.
  • If the player equipped any other class, 'Winds of Fate' gains +5% Non-Crit/DoT/Crit Damage Reduction to player.
• (Ancient) Shadow Base classes gained their base class related effects on  January 17th, 2026.
• Dragon Base classes gained their base class related effects on  June 27th, 2026.
